summary: Iteration 17 - Snooze Update Notification Feature - All tests PASSED. Backend: 9/9 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All 10 features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/updates/notification/snooze?version=1.5.0&hours=48 sets snoozed_version and snooze_until (48h from now) in DB
Backend: POST /api/updates/notification/dismiss?version=1.5.0 sets dismissed_version in DB (permanent dismiss)
Backend: GET /api/updates/notification returns snoozed_version, snooze_until, and dismissed_version fields
Backend: Snooze endpoint requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Snooze works with different hour values (1, 24, 48, 72)
Backend: Banner visibility logic - snoozed_version=latest_version AND snooze_until in future hides banner
Backend: Banner visibility logic - snoozed_version != latest_version shows banner
Backend: Banner visibility logic - dismissed_version != latest_version shows banner (no active snooze)
Backend: Snooze data persists across multiple GET calls
Frontend: Dashboard banner shows all 4 buttons (Release Notes, Update starten, Spaeter erinnern, X)
Frontend: 'Spaeter erinnern' button hides banner and calls snooze API with version=latest_version&hours=48
Frontend: X dismiss button hides banner and calls dismiss API with version=latest_version (permanent)
Frontend: Banner hidden when snoozed_version=latest_version AND snooze_until is in the future
Frontend: Banner stays hidden after page reload when dismissed_version matches latest_version
Frontend: Banner stays hidden after page reload when snoozed and snooze_until in future
seed_data_creation: Test data was injected into SQLite DB for update_check_cache with update_available=true, latest_version=1.5.0. Snooze tests reset dismissed_version and snoozed_version to 0.0.0 before each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 tested the new snooze notification feature. Key points: 1) POST /api/updates/notification/snooze?version=X&hours=Y sets snoozed_version and snooze_until (ISO timestamp). 2) GET /api/updates/notification returns snoozed_version, snooze_until, and dismissed_version fields. 3) Banner visibility: hidden if (snoozed_version === latest_version AND snooze_until > now) OR (dismissed_version === latest_version). 4) Frontend banner has 4 buttons: Release Notes (toggle changelog), Update starten (navigate to /admin/system), Spaeter erinnern (calls snooze API with hours=48), X (calls dismiss API). 5) To test banner visibility, reset dismissed_version and snoozed_version to 0.0.0 via API. 6) Snooze data persists to SQLite DB via Settings table (key='update_check_cache').
